sprite::Fingerprint Struct Reference

#include <fingerprint.hpp>

List of all members.

Public Member Functions

 Fingerprint (size_t sz=0)
bool has (size_t id) const
 Returns true if the fingerprint contains the given id.
ChoiceDirection at (size_t id) const
 Returns the value at id. Precondition: this->has(id).
void resize (size_t sz)
 Extend or shrink the fingerprint without changing any values.
void set (size_t id, ChoiceDirection x)
 Set the value at id.
size_t size () const
 Returns the size of the fingerprint (largest id + 1).

Detailed Description

A fingerprint specification.

A fingerprint is an array of a known number of slots. Each slot may be used or unused and used slots may have the value LEFT or RIGHT.

Definition at line 18 of file fingerprint.hpp.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

sprite::Fingerprint::Fingerprint (  size_t  sz = 0  )  [inline]
 

Build an empty fingerprint.

Parameters:
sz The size (number of slots) in the fingerprint. Initially, they will all be valueless.
